subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. Praise be to God for the effulgent rays of the Sun of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی لله الحمد باشراقات انوار آفتاب توحید حقیقی
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
